body.purpose: Default for all screens and prompts.

label.purpose: Muted metadata, lobby seat lines, HUD text.

caption.purpose: Game log, error lines, badge text. The size floor.

shadows.name: table-drop
shadows.purpose: Panels and modals lifting off the felt.

shadows.name: hand-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards resting in the hand bar.

shadows.name: drag-lift
shadows.purpose: The card being dragged (filter, not box-shadow).

shadows.name: button-press
shadows.purpose: Chunky control at rest; active shortens to 0 3px 10px.

shadows.name: priority-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold glow on the priority holder's life orb (canvas shadowColor).

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: 150ms ease-out-quint on Button variants and turn-yield chrome; honor prefers-reduced-motion via global.css.

breakpoints.name: portrait-gate
breakpoints.purpose: Full-screen rotate-to-landscape gate; never reflow the builder/board to a vertical stack.

breakpoints.name: short-landscape
breakpoints.purpose: Tighten panel padding; keep side-by-side columns.

breakpoints.name: coarse-pointer
breakpoints.purpose: 44×44 min hit targets on buttons and .hit-quiet chrome.

components.name: Game Button
components.description: The canonical chunky control: inset highlight, brightens on hover, shadow shortens on press.
components.css: .ds-btn-game { background: #276b3c; color: #eafff0; padding: 8px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 600 14px system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.16), 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-btn-game:hover { background: #2f7d46; } .ds-btn-game:active { box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1), 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-btn-game:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18), 0 0 0 2px rgba(90,200,140,0.55), 0 6px 20px rgba(47,140,90,0.45); } .ds-btn-game:disabled { background: #24312b; color: #66786e; cursor: default; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Screen Button
components.description: Flat primary for the auth/lobby/builder surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2f7d46; color: #eafff0; padding: 8px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 600 14px system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3e9a58; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(90,200,140,0.55); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions: transparent with the vine hairline.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #ccddee; padding: 8px 14px; border: 1px solid #22cc44; border-radius: 6px; font: 600 14px system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(90,200,140,0.55); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Glass fill over the felt, vine hairline, green focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { padding: 8px 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #eeffff; border: 1px solid #22cc44; border-radius: 6px; font: 14px system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #99ccbb; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(90,200,140,0.55); }

components.name: Panel
components.description: The standard surface: translucent forest over the felt, vine hairline, table-drop shadow.
components.html:
Your decks
Sultai Value Engine — 100 cards
components.css: .ds-panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; padding: 24px; width: 100%; max-width: min(100% - 2rem, 420px); min-width: 0; background: rgba(16,24,22,0.98); color: #eeffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #22cc44; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); font: 14px system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; } .ds-panel-body { color: #99ccbb; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: List Row
components.description: Deck lists and catalog rows: glass over felt with the dim vine edge.
components.css: .ds-list-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid #11cc33; border-radius: 8px; color: #eeffff; font: 14px system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-list-row:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-list-meta { color: #99ccbb; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Life Orb (priority)
components.description: Signature: a seat's avatar. Seat-colored ring at rest; priority gold ring + glow when that player must act.
components.css: .ds-orb { width: 108px; height: 108px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(14,26,20,0.95); border: 3px solid rgba(90,200,140,0.9); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-orb-priority { border-color: #ffd76a; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(255,215,106,0.6); } .ds-orb-life { color: #eeffff; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-orb-name { color: #99ccbb; font-size: 12px; }

components.name: Turn Banner
components.description: Fixed HUD pill announcing whose turn and step; green when yours, rust when not.
components.css: .ds-turn { padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; color: #eeffff; font: 14px system-ui, sans-serif; background: rgba(90,50,40,0.95); border: 1px solid #cc8855; } .ds-turn-yours { background: rgba(40,90,60,0.95); border-color: #55cc99; }

narrative.overview: MTGA's game-client polish with every storefront wire cut. The surface is a near-black green felt that never sells you anything: no currency badges, no reward glow, no chrome that isn't game state. What remains is the part of a digital card game that actually feels good — chunky, pressable controls, cream cardstock glowing against dark felt, and light that means something: gold appears only when the game needs a human decision. The register is product: the table is the hero and the chrome recedes. Auth, lobby, and deck builder are quiet, consistent surfaces built from the same panel/button/input vocabulary; the drama budget — glow, arrows, seat color — is spent at the table, on priority, combat, and the stack.
keyCharacteristics: Landscape-first mobile: rotate gate in portrait, side-by-side in landscape
Dark green felt world; translucent panels let the table read through
Gold = "a decision is owed"; seat color = "who"; red/green arrows = combat
One type face (system-ui), hierarchy by size and weight only
Chunky, tactile controls with a visible pressed state
Every state drawn: hover, active, disabled, focus, priority

rules.name: The Landscape Rule
rules.body: Mobile is landscape-first. Portrait phones get a rotate gate; never stack the builder or board into a vertical layout.

rules.name: The Gold Means Act Rule
rules.body: Priority gold appears only on the player who must act; commander gold only on commanders. Gold never decorates. If something is gold and the game doesn't need you, it's wrong. Yielded pass uses amber earth, not priority gold.

rules.name: The One Felt Rule
rules.body: Forest Floor is the only page background. Panels float over it translucently; no screen invents a lighter body surface.

rules.name: The Seat Is Sacred Rule
rules.body: Seat hues mean identity, never semantics — never reuse a seat color for success/danger/info.

rules.name: The One Face Rule
rules.body: system-ui only, everywhere, including the canvas. Hierarchy is size and weight, never a second family. Display fonts in UI are prohibited.

rules.name: The Glow Is Game State Rule
rules.body: Shadows say "this floats"; glow says "the game wants you". Never glow decoratively, never glow a resting element.

dos: Do spend gold only on game state: Priority Gold (#FFD76A) for "act now", Commander Gold (#E9B84A) for commanders. Nothing else.
Do define every control state — rest, hover, active, disabled, focus — using the game button as the reference implementation.
Do keep panels translucent (98%/92%) so the felt reads through; the table is always present.
Do use seat colors wherever a player is referenced — band outlines, orbs, log mentions — identity is color-coded everywhere or nowhere.
Do keep controls chunky: inset top highlight, shadow that shortens on press, ≥ 8px 14px hit areas.
Do keep motion 150–250ms, ease-out, state-conveying, with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback, when motion is added.
donts: Don't reflow the product into a portrait phone layout — landscape-first; portrait gets a rotate gate.
Don't add F2P game chrome: currency badges, battle-pass glow, reward-popup maximalism, screen-shake.
Don't flatten the table into a generic SaaS dashboard: no stat tiles, no icon-heading-text card grids, no cool-gray defaults.
Don't ship hobby-tool jank (Untap/Cockatrice-style): mismatched controls, debug-looking dense panels, unstyled browser defaults.
Don't invent a third button vocabulary. Two exist (game, screen); the direction of travel is one.
Don't reuse seat hues for semantic states, or Priority Gold for anything that isn't priority.
Don't set Fog (#8899AA) below 12px or use it for prose — it is metadata ink only.
Don't use display fonts, parchment textures, or ornate borders — the felt look is material restraint, not fantasy dressing.
Don't exceed the z-scale (board → HUD → backdrop 29 → modal 30) with arbitrary values like 999.
